data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Effective/expiry windows' but did not provide any concrete evidence or checks related to this requirement. The prior steps do not include any validation of effective or expiry windows, nor do they reference any relevant entities or endpoints that would confirm compliance with this requirement. As a result, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of effective/expiry windows being validated or checked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
